claim: Added serialize-safe fog-of-war discovery: SimState.discovered (string[]) starts with the homeland plus its neighbours, migrate() reveals the destination and its neighbours, it round-trips through serialize/load (with a fallback for pre-fog saves), and map.ts renders undiscovered regions as anonymous unselectable '?' nodes.
notes: New regions.ts helpers: NEIGHBOR_RADIUS (0.42) + regionNeighbors(); the resulting adjacency graph is verified connected so the whole world stays reachable by migrating. Discovery is purely informational state — it gates nothing in the sim — so balance is unchanged; npm run sim still reaches the Information Age at year 485. New src/sim/exploration.test.ts covers initial fog, reveal-on-migrate, neighbour/connectivity invariants, a save/load round-trip, and the pre-fog save fallback. The sim remains pure (no Phaser/DOM); map.ts only reads sim.state.discovered. All 39 tests and the build pass.
